title: cyrtodeira coccinea
intro: Cyrtodeira coccinea, also known as the Red Flowering Sida, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cyrtodeira coccinea include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant's leaves are often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to prepare herbal remedies, while its roots and flowers are also utilized in various herbal preparations.
